name: rbxts-transform-boost
description: roblox-ts transformer: automatic --!native, GetService hoisting, property chain caching, loop bounds hoisting, and Luau type annotation injection

scripts.bench:rotor: bun run build && cd bench && rotor build -p tsconfig.rotor.json && rotor build -p tsconfig.notransform.rotor.json
scripts.bench:roblox-ts: bun run build && cd bench && rbxtsc -p tsconfig.roblox-ts.json --rojo roblox-ts.project.json && rbxtsc -p tsconfig.notransform.roblox-ts.json --rojo roblox-ts.project.json
scripts.bench:rbxlx:rotor: bun run bench:rotor && cd bench && rojo build rotor.project.json -o benchmark-rotor.rbxlx
scripts.bench:rbxlx:roblox-ts: npm run bench:roblox-ts && cd bench && rojo build roblox-ts.project.json -o benchmark-roblox-ts.rbxlx
